case_title: CARADINE, DORRIS VS ROBINSON, WILLA L.

docket_entries.description: CERT MAIL OF PLTF'S CLAIM SENT TO WILLA ROBINSON RETURNED--UNCLAIMED
PARTIES HAVE AGREED TO MEDIATE THE DISPUTE W/ THE COMMUNITY BOARD. COMM. BOARD TO CONTACT PARTIES TO SCHEDULE DATE. IF PARTIES RESOLVE THE DISPUTE, NO
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-20-1999, OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, WILLA L.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARADINE, DORRIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBINSON, WILLA L. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $59.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,059.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CARADINE, DORRIS AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, WILLA L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-06-1999, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-27-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, WILLA L. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-06-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ROBINSON, WILLA L. HEARING SET FOR JAN-24-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 3/27/00 AND THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE CASE.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JAN-24-2000, GRANTED
